name: Xinjiang Xuefeng Sci-Tech (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Xuefeng Sci-Tech (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and marketing civil explosives primarily for use in the field of infrastructure construction, economic construction, and mineral resources development. The company's products include emulsion and site mixed explosives; expanded ammonium nitrate explosives; detonating cords; and ordinary instantaneous electric, coal electric, and electronic detonators. It also offers blasting and armed escort services. The company also exports its products to Central Asia.
